category_sources: Official mawk page says mawk is an interpreter for the AWK Programming Language.
source_facts.description says Interpreter for the AWK Programming Language.
display_name_sources: source_facts.name is mawk and the official project page uses mawk.
docs_sources: Official mawk manpage and project page on invisible-island.net.
repo_sources: Official mawk page says the maintainer exports RCS history to GitHub and links mawk-snapshots for release and interim-label snapshots.
tags_sources: Official manpage and project page describe mawk as a pattern scanning and text processing language implementation.
